description_long: This house features a modern, boxy design with a flat roof and a combination of brick and large glass window panels. The front facade is defined by two prominent black-framed windows and a recessed entryway, which is accessed via a paved walkway and a small set of steps. The structure includes a curved bay window section, adding architectural interest and natural light to the interior. The rear and side elevations are mostly solid brick with minimal window openings, emphasizing privacy. The house appears to have a single story with a spacious, open-plan layout visible through the large windows. The exterior materials and clean lines suggest a contemporary urban residence.
description: A modern, single-story brick house with large black-framed windows, a flat roof, and a curved bay window feature. The entryway is recessed and accessed by a paved walkway and steps.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entryway, two large black-framed windows, and the curved bay window section.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the solid brick wall, the curved bay window, and the continuation of the paved walkway.
description_view_2: Rear view with minimal window openings and a mostly solid brick facade.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the solid brick wall and the extension of the paved walkway.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows and a curved bay window
attribute_entryway_design: Recessed entryway with steps, paved walkway, and minimal decorative elements
